wind_projects.name: Golden Plains Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Bulgana 220 kV substation (new connection point)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV double-circuit line required. Bulgana substation augmentation. Part of Western Victoria Transmission Network Project corridor.
wind_projects.document_title: Golden Plains Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (EES)

wind_projects.name: MacIntyre Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: Macintyre Windfarm Pty Ltd and Arc Energy Macintyre Pty Ltd
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: MacIntyre 275 kV substation (new, built by Powerlink), Southern Downs QLD
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: IMPORTANT: Major Powerlink augmentation required — new 275 kV MacIntyre substation constructed plus 45 km of new 275 kV transmission line from MacIntyre substation to Kempsey 275 kV substation. Total transmission investment ~$400 M. One of the largest single connection augmentations in the QLD NEM.
wind_projects.document_title: MacIntyre Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)

wind_projects.name: Golden Plains Wind Farm East
wind_projects.developer: Golden Plains WF1 Pty Ltd as trustee for the Golden Plains WF1 Unit Trust
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Golden Plains 220 kV substation (new, shared with Stage 1A), Western Victoria
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Shared 220 kV connection with Stage 1A. New substation built to accommodate the full 1,488 MW Golden Plains complex. Part of the Western Victoria Transmission Network Project corridor.
wind_projects.document_title: Golden Plains Wind Farm Stage 1B (East) — EES Amendment (VIC DEECA)

wind_projects.name: Golden Plains Wind Farm West
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Bulgana 220 kV substation (shared corridor with Golden Plains East)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Shared 220 kV transmission corridor with Golden Plains East. Joint network augmentation significantly reduces per-project connection cost.
wind_projects.document_title: Golden Plains Wind Farm West Environment Effects Statement (EES)

wind_projects.name: Stockyard Hill Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Beaufort 220 kV substation (AusNet Services), Western Victoria
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV connection required. AusNet upgraded Beaufort substation and installed new transformer bank for 530 MW export capacity. Largest single wind farm connection in Victoria at time of commissioning.
wind_projects.document_title: Stockyard Hill Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC EES)

wind_projects.name: Wambo Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: Cubico Sustainable Investments / Stanwell Corporation (50:50 JV)
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Oakey 132 kV substation
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Oakey 132 kV substation augmentation required. New transformer bay and 132 kV line works. Powerlink augmentation conditions apply.
wind_projects.document_title: Wambo Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (QLD)

wind_projects.name: Coopers Gap Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Tarong 275 kV substation (Powerlink Queensland)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 275 kV connection line to Tarong. Powerlink augmented Tarong substation bus and protection systems. QLD transmission investment assessed under RIT-T process.
wind_projects.document_title: Coopers Gap Wind Farm Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP EIS)

wind_projects.name: Clarke Creek Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Clarke Creek 132 kV substation (new on-site), stepped up to Powerlink 275 kV at Boomer 275 kV substation
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: IMPORTANT: Significant new transmission required — ~55 km of 132 kV line plus step-up to Powerlink 275 kV network at Boomer substation. Powerlink augmentation of Boomer substation required. High connection capex for Central QLD location versus Southern QLD wind farms.
wind_projects.document_title: Clarke Creek Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)

wind_projects.name: Macarthur Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: Macarthur Wind Farm Pty Ltd and Meridian Wind Macarthur Pty Ltd
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Macarthur 220/66 kV substation (new on-site), Western Victoria
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV substation and line. Was the largest wind farm in the Southern Hemisphere at commissioning (2012). AusNet 220 kV required significant augmentation to handle 420 MW export.
wind_projects.document_title: Macarthur Wind Farm Environmental Effects Statement (VIC DSE EES)

wind_projects.name: Uungula Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Elong Elong 330 kV substation (CWO REZ connection hub)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid CWO REZ infrastructure (Elong Elong 330 kV substation) funded under REZ access scheme. Connection cost partially socialised across all CWO REZ access rights holders.
wind_projects.document_title: Uungula Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW SSD)
wind_projects.turbine_model: Vestas V150-4.2 MW or V162-6.2 MW (technology envelope)

wind_projects.name: Rye Park Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Capital 330 kV substation (TransGrid), near Boorowa NSW
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV connection line required. Capital substation upgrade approved as part of SSD assessment. TransGrid connection works coordinated with Capital Wind Farm grid exit point.
wind_projects.document_title: Rye Park Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW IPC SSD-8840)

wind_projects.name: Dundonnell Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Mortlake 220 kV substation (AusNet Services)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV connection to AusNet's South-West Victoria transmission system. AusNet upgraded Mortlake substation bus to accommodate Dundonnell load-flow.
wind_projects.document_title: Dundonnell Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DELWP EES)

wind_projects.name: Lotus Creek Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Marlborough 132 kV substation
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Marlborough substation augmentation required. New transformer bay. 285 MW capacity may require substation transformer upgrade.
wind_projects.document_title: Lotus Creek Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (QLD)
wind_projects.turbine_model: Vestas V162-6.2 MW or Siemens Gamesa SG 6.0-170 (technology envelope)

wind_projects.name: Berrybank Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Bulgana 220 kV substation (AusNet Services), near Ararat VIC
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Bulgana substation augmented by AusNet to accommodate multiple large wind farms in the Western Victoria Wind Farm Zone.
wind_projects.document_title: Berrybank Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DELWP EES)

wind_projects.name: Sapphire Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: SWF1 Operations Holdings Pty Ltd as trustee for SWF1 Hold Trust
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Uralla 330 kV substation (TransGrid), Northern NSW
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV connection to TransGrid Uralla. TransGrid reinforced Uralla to accept multiple Northern Tablelands wind projects. Part of the NSW New England REZ connection corridor.
wind_projects.document_title: Sapphire Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW DP&E SSD-6688)

wind_projects.name: Snowtown S2 Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: Snowtown Wind Farm Stage 2 Pty Ltd
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Snowtown 275/66 kV substation (ElectraNet), Mid North SA (shared with Stage 1)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Snowtown substation expanded to accommodate Stage 2 (270 MW additional to Stage 1 99 MW). Shared connection infrastructure.
wind_projects.document_title: Snowtown Wind Farm Stage 2 Development Application (SA EPA / EPBC 2010/5707)

wind_projects.name: Carmodys Hill Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Hummocks Hill 132 kV substation
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: ElectraNet 132 kV augmentation required. SA mid-north transmission network has significant wind congestion; augmentation studies ongoing for REZ development.
wind_projects.document_title: Carmodys Hill Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (SA)
wind_projects.turbine_model: Vestas V162-6.2 MW or Nordex N163-5.X (technology envelope)

wind_projects.name: Boulder Creek Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Strathmore 132 kV substation
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Strathmore 132 kV substation augmentation required. New transformer bay and protection upgrades for 228 MW injection.
wind_projects.document_title: Boulder Creek Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (QLD)

wind_projects.name: Collector
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Capital 330 kV substation (TransGrid), near Collector/Bungendore NSW
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV connection to TransGrid Capital substation. TransGrid upgraded Capital to handle multiple Southern Tablelands wind farms including Collector and Rye Park.
wind_projects.document_title: Collector Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW DP&E SSD-7480)

wind_projects.name: Ryan Corner Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Ryan Corner 220 kV substation (new, on-site), near Hamilton, Western Victoria
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV substation and connection line. AusNet augmented the Hamilton/Portland corridor for Ryan Corner and adjacent projects.
wind_projects.document_title: Ryan Corner Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DEECA EES)

wind_projects.name: Port Augusta Renewable Energy Park - Wind
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Port Augusta North 275/66 kV substation (ElectraNet), near Port Augusta SA
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal augmentation. Port Augusta is a central node of the SA transmission network. PARP replaces former Alinta Energy coal/gas plant capacity at Port Augusta.
wind_projects.document_title: Port Augusta Renewable Energy Park Development Application (SA EPA / EPBC 2018/8280)

wind_projects.name: Silverton Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: PARF Company 8 Pty Ltd as trustee for the Silverton Project Trust
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Broken Hill 220 kV substation (TransGrid / Essential Energy interconnect), Far West NSW
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Connection to Broken Hill substation via TransGrid. Broken Hill is remote from main NSW grid, connected via 220 kV to SA. Silverton exports through SA route. Co-located with AGL 53 MW Broken Hill Solar Farm.
wind_projects.document_title: Silverton Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW SSD-5703 / EPBC 2013/7036)

wind_projects.name: Bulgana Green Power Hub - Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Bulgana 220 kV substation (on-site — wind farm anchors this substation)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal — Bulgana substation was purpose-built as part of this project, then expanded for Golden Plains and Berrybank.
wind_projects.document_title: Bulgana Green Power Hub Environment Effects Statement (VIC DELWP EES)

wind_projects.name: Dulacca Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: Dulacca Energy Project Co Pty Ltd
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Dulacca 132/66 kV substation (new, on-site), connected to Powerlink Wandoan corridor
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 132 kV connection to Powerlink grid. Powerlink Western Downs transmission corridor augmented for multiple CIS Round projects.
wind_projects.document_title: Dulacca Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)

wind_projects.name: Mount Emerald
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Mount Emerald 132/33 kV substation (new on-site), Powerlink Tablelands 132 kV network, Far North QLD
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Powerlink Far North QLD 132 kV network reinforcement. Mount Emerald and adjacent Kaban share connection infrastructure. Both required combined network upgrade.
wind_projects.document_title: Mount Emerald Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)

wind_projects.name: Musselroe Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Musselroe Bay 110/33 kV substation (new), NE Tasmania TasNetworks backbone
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 110 kV line and substation. TasNetworks augmented NE Tasmania 110 kV backbone. Remote location means long connection. TasNetworks 110 kV (not 132 kV as on mainland).
wind_projects.document_title: Musselroe Wind Farm Environmental Impact Assessment (TAS EPA)

wind_projects.name: Kaban Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Kaban 132 kV substation (new on-site), shared Tablelands 132 kV corridor with Mount Emerald
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Kaban and Mount Emerald together required combined ~333 MW upgrade to Powerlink Tablelands 132 kV network.
wind_projects.document_title: Kaban Green Power Hub EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)

wind_projects.name: Cattle Hill Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Repulse 110 kV substation (TasNetworks), Central Highlands TAS
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 110 kV connection to TasNetworks. Line protection and fault level management at Repulse substation upgraded. TasNetworks Marrawah Wind Farm to Cattle Hill system strength assessment conducted.
wind_projects.document_title: Cattle Hill Wind Energy Facility Environmental Impact Assessment (TAS EPA)

wind_projects.name: Yendon Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Yendon 66/22 kV substation (new on-site), near Ballarat VIC
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: AusNet 66 kV network upgrade near Ballarat. 66 kV connection appropriate for 142 MW given local network capacity.
wind_projects.document_title: Yendon Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DEECA EES)

wind_projects.name: Waterloo Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Waterloo 275/66 kV substation (ElectraNet), near Waterloo SA
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 66 kV connection to ElectraNet. Mid North SA 275 kV network is well-established. Modest augmentation for 131 MW scale.
wind_projects.document_title: Waterloo Wind Farm Environmental Statement (SA EPA / EPBC 2006/2906)

wind_projects.name: Hawkesdale Wind Farm
wind_projects.developer: Hawkesdale Asset Pty Ltd as trustee for Hawkesdale Asset Trust
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Hawkesdale 66/22 kV substation (new on-site), SW Victoria
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: New 66 kV connection to AusNet Services. Modest augmentation for 90 MW project.
wind_projects.document_title: Hawkesdale Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DEECA EES)

wind_projects.name: Pottinger Energy Park (Wind)
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: Project EnergyConnect 330 kV corridor (via 5 internal 330/33 kV substations and 1 switchyard)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Five 330/33 kV wind substations, one 330 kV BESS substation, one 330 kV switchyard. 330 kV overhead transmission line to Project EnergyConnect. SW REZ access right of 831 MW (Phase 1) awarded by EnergyCo April 2025.
wind_projects.document_title: Pottinger Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (SSD-59235464)
wind_projects.turbine_model: Not yet finalised (envelope approach, up to 280m tip height)

wind_projects.name: Yanco Delta Wind Farm
wind_projects.connection_substation_name: TransGrid Dinawan 330 kV Substation (under construction at Bundure, ~35 km NE of Jerilderie)
wind_projects.connection_augmentation: Dinawan Substation to be expanded with two additional 330 kV bays. 28 km 330 kV overhead transmission line from project to Dinawan. 1 central primary substation + up to 4 collector substations within project. 1,460 MW transmission access allocated by EnergyCo (SW REZ, April 2025).
wind_projects.document_title: Yanco Delta Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (SSD-41743746)
wind_projects.turbine_model: Not yet finalised (up to 270m tip height, more powerful than any currently operating in Australia)

bess_projects.name: Waratah Super Battery
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Tomago 330 kV substation (TransGrid), Hunter Valley NSW
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid Tomago substation upgrade for 850 MW BESS. NSW IPC SSD assessment included detailed TransGrid connection feasibility. Critical grid support as Hunter Valley coal plants retire.
bess_projects.document_title: Waratah Super Battery — State Significant Development Assessment (NSW IPC SSD-2022-0195)

bess_projects.name: Eraring Big Battery
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Eraring 330 kV substation (TransGrid), Lake Macquarie NSW (on-site, former power station)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a separate battery from the existing eraring-battery (150 MW Tesla Megapack). The Eraring Big Battery (700 MW Wartsila Quantum3) is a different, larger project also at the Eraring site. Both batteries use the same TransGrid 330 kV Eraring substation, eliminating major connection capex.
bess_projects.document_title: Eraring Big Battery — State Significant Development Assessment (NSW IPC SSD-2022-0119)

bess_projects.name: Supernode BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Greenbank 275 kV substation (Powerlink)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 275 kV feeder bay at Greenbank required. Greenbank is a major 275 kV hub serving south-east QLD; existing headroom sufficient for BESS injection without major augmentation.
bess_projects.document_title: Supernode Battery Energy Storage System — EIS (QLD)

bess_projects.name: Western Downs Battery - Stage 1 And 2
bess_projects.developer: Western Downs BESS Pty Ltd as trustee for Western Downs BESS Trust
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Western Downs 275 kV substation (new Powerlink connection point), QLD
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New Powerlink 275 kV connection in Western Downs. Substation and transmission corridor upgrades to accommodate battery plus multiple adjacent solar/wind projects (QLD CIS portfolio).
bess_projects.document_title: Western Downs BESS EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)

bess_projects.name: Liddell BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Liddell 330 kV substation (former power station, on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal. Existing 330 kV switchyard from 2,000 MW coal plant reused. New BESS feeder bays and protection required. Significant cost advantage over greenfield connection (~A$50-100M saved vs remote site).
bess_projects.document_title: Liddell Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW)
bess_projects.cell_supplier: To be confirmed through procurement (likely CATL or Samsung SDI)

bess_projects.name: Tomago BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Tomago 330 kV substation (TransGrid)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV feeder bay at Tomago substation required. Short connection distance and existing high-capacity substation minimise augmentation cost. NSCAS agreement with TransGrid.
bess_projects.document_title: Tomago Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Eraring Battery
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Eraring 330 kV substation (former power station, on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal augmentation. Existing 330 kV bays from the 2,880 MW coal plant reused. New BESS protection and control systems required but major civil/HV works avoided. Major cost saving vs greenfield connection.
bess_projects.document_title: Eraring Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW IPC)
bess_projects.cell_supplier: Samsung SDI / CATL (per Wartsila supply chain)

bess_projects.name: Orana BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Elong Elong 330 kV substation (CWO REZ connection hub)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid CWO REZ infrastructure partially funded via REZ access charge. Connection cost socialised across CWO REZ access rights holders. Significant cost saving vs standalone connection.
bess_projects.document_title: Orana Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Bellambi Heights Renewables Project
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Bellambi 330 kV terminal substation (TransGrid)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV cable and feeder bay at Bellambi Terminal. Bellambi is a major 330 kV hub serving the Illawarra; existing capacity sufficient. Low augmentation cost given proximity to 330 kV terminal.
bess_projects.document_title: Bellambi Heights Renewables Project — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Wooreen Energy Storage System
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Wooreen 220 kV substation / Latrobe Valley 220 kV network (AusNet)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV feeder bay on Latrobe Valley network. Moderate augmentation. High-voltage transmission headroom exists post-Hazelwood closure; relatively low augmentation cost for this location.
bess_projects.document_title: Wooreen Energy Storage System — EES (VIC)

bess_projects.name: Elaine BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Elaine 220 kV substation (AusNet)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV feeder bay at Elaine substation. Moderate augmentation cost. Western Victoria 220 kV network has limited headroom; TransGrid / AusNet augmentation may be required at higher voltages.
bess_projects.document_title: Elaine Battery Energy Storage System — EES/Permit (VIC)

bess_projects.name: Mortlake Battery
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Mortlake 220 kV substation (on-site, shared with gas peaker)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal. Existing 220 kV switchyard shared with Mortlake gas peaker (550 MW). New BESS feeder bay required but major civil/HV works avoided. Cost advantage similar to co-located gas station BESS projects.
bess_projects.document_title: Mortlake Battery Energy Storage System — EES/Permit (VIC)

bess_projects.name: Bulabul BESS 1
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Bulahdelah 330 kV substation (TransGrid)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV feeder bay at Bulahdelah substation. Sydney–Brisbane 330 kV corridor has capacity; moderate augmentation cost.
bess_projects.document_title: Bulabul BESS 1 — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Tarong BESS - Stanwell
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Tarong 275 kV substation (on-site, former coal plant)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal. Existing Tarong coal plant 275 kV switchyard reused. New BESS feeder bay required. Major cost advantage — former 1,400 MW coal plant substation provides ample capacity for 300 MW BESS without augmentation.
bess_projects.document_title: Tarong BESS — EIS (QLD Coordinated Project)

bess_projects.name: Victorian Big Battery
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Moorabool 500/220 kV substation (AusNet Services), Lara near Geelong VIC (on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal — Moorabool is one of the most significant 500 kV substations in the NEM. BESS occupies cleared land within substation perimeter. VIC government fast-tracked via state planning approval.
bess_projects.document_title: Victorian Big Battery — Planning Permit Application (VIC DEECA fast-track approval)

bess_projects.name: Gnarwarre BESS Facility
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Moorabool 220 kV substation (AusNet)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV feeder bay at Moorabool. Moorabool is a major 220 kV hub; existing headroom available. Moderate connection line cost for 13 km distance.
bess_projects.document_title: Gnarwarre Battery Energy Storage System — EES/Permit (VIC)

bess_projects.name: Williamsdale BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Williamsdale 330 kV substation (TransGrid)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV feeder bay at Williamsdale substation. Moderate augmentation cost. Sydney–Canberra 330 kV corridor has capacity for BESS injection without major augmentation.
bess_projects.document_title: Williamsdale Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Pine Lodge BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Pine Lodge 66 kV substation (AusNet)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: IMPORTANT: 66 kV connection for a 250 MW BESS is unusual and highly constraining. 250 MW at 66 kV requires very high current — likely requires substation transformer upgrade and 66 kV feeder augmentation. May trigger need for 220 kV connection instead, adding significant cost. AusNet augmentation study required.
bess_projects.document_title: Pine Lodge Battery Energy Storage System — EES (VIC)

bess_projects.name: Torrens Island BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Torrens Island 275/66 kV substation (former power station, on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal — former 480 MW gas plant infrastructure reused. ElectraNet Torrens Island 275/66 kV substation retained and adapted. Strategic location close to Adelaide CBD load centre.
bess_projects.document_title: Torrens Island BESS Development Application (SA EPA)

bess_projects.name: Summerfield BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Hummocks Hill 132 kV substation (ElectraNet)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 132 kV feeder bay at Hummocks Hill. SA mid-north 132 kV network constrained; augmentation studies required for multiple wind/BESS projects in this corridor. ElectraNet REZ planning underway.
bess_projects.document_title: Summerfield Battery Energy Storage System — EIS (SA)

bess_projects.name: Mornington BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Mornington 66 kV substation (AusNet)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: IMPORTANT: 66 kV connection for 240 MW is highly constraining. The Mornington Peninsula 66 kV network is primarily a distribution network — connecting 240 MW storage here requires significant augmentation of 66 kV infrastructure. Risk of requiring connection voltage upgrade to 220 kV. AusNet augmentation study results critical to project economics.
bess_projects.document_title: Mornington Battery Energy Storage System — EES (VIC)

bess_projects.name: Woolooga BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Woolooga substation 132 kV (co-located with solar farm)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal line works. New BESS feeder bay at existing Woolooga solar farm substation. Combined 422 MW site (solar + BESS) may trigger augmentation of the 132 kV line to Gympie/Kingaroy area substations.
bess_projects.document_title: Woolooga Battery Energy Storage System — EIS (QLD)

bess_projects.name: Tailem Bend Stage 3
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Tailem Bend 132 kV substation (co-located with solar farm)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal new works. Existing Tailem Bend 132 kV substation shared with 250 MW solar farm. New BESS feeder bay required. Combined ~454 MW site may trigger ElectraNet 132 kV line augmentation from Tailem Bend toward Murray Bridge/Adelaide.
bess_projects.document_title: Tailem Bend Stage 3 Battery Energy Storage System — EIS (SA)

bess_projects.name: Pelican Point BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Pelican Point 275 kV substation (ENGIE, on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal. Existing 275 kV connection reused from gas power station. New BESS feeder bay only. Adelaide 275 kV ring has capacity. Very low augmentation cost — significant advantage of co-location.
bess_projects.document_title: Pelican Point Battery Energy Storage System — EIS (SA)

bess_projects.name: New England Solar Farm BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: New England Solar Farm 330 kV connection (co-located)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal new works. Existing 330 kV connection for 720 MW solar farm already established; BESS adds new feeder bay only. New England REZ transmission corridor being expanded by TransGrid.
bess_projects.document_title: New England Solar Farm BESS — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Hornsdale Power Reserve
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Hornsdale Wind Farm 275/66 kV substation (on-site, co-located)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal augmentation. BESS connected to existing Hornsdale Wind Farm 275/66 kV substation via new dedicated LV/MV feeder bays. ElectraNet assessed additional fault level contribution at Hornsdale 275 kV node.
bess_projects.document_title: Hornsdale Power Reserve — Development Application (SA EPA / EPBC 2017/7791)

bess_projects.name: Koorangie Energy Storage System
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Koorangie 220/66 kV substation (AusNet Services), Northern Victoria
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: AusNet augmentation of Northern Victoria 220 kV network. Grid-forming Tesla Megapack provides synthetic inertia for Northern Victoria-NSW interconnect.
bess_projects.document_title: Koorangie Energy Storage System — Planning Permit Application (VIC DEECA)

bess_projects.name: Hazelwood Battery Energy Storage System (HBESS)
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Hazelwood 220/66 kV substation (former power station, on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal — former 1,600 MW coal station had extensive connection infrastructure at 220 kV and 500 kV. BESS connects at 220 kV bus. AusNet Services decommissioned excess bays; BESS added new feeder bays to existing switchgear.
bess_projects.document_title: Hazelwood BESS — Referral Assessment (VIC DEECA / EPA Victoria)

bess_projects.name: Calala BESS A2
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Tamworth 330 kV substation (TransGrid), NSW New England REZ (shared with Calala A1)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Shared connection infrastructure with Calala A1. Combined A1+A2 = 250 MW / 500 MWh at Tamworth 330 kV. TransGrid New England REZ augmentation serves both stages.
bess_projects.document_title: Calala BESS A2 — State Significant Development Assessment (NSW IPC SSD)

bess_projects.name: Templers BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Templers 275/66 kV substation (ElectraNet), Mid North SA
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: ElectraNet augmentation of Mid North SA 275 kV network. Templers area has existing infrastructure for adjacent wind/solar projects.
bess_projects.document_title: Templers BESS Development Application (SA EPA)

bess_projects.name: Bennetts Creek BESS
bess_projects.developer: Bennetts Creek Energy Project Pty Ltd in its capacity as Trustee for the Bennetts Creek Energy Project Trust
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Bennetts Creek 66/22 kV substation (AusNet Services), Western Victoria
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: New 66 kV connection to AusNet Services. Bennetts Creek area in Western VIC has growing renewable cluster requiring AusNet network upgrades.
bess_projects.document_title: Bennetts Creek BESS Planning Permit (VIC DEECA)

bess_projects.name: Calala BESS A1
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Tamworth 330 kV substation (TransGrid), NSW New England REZ
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid Tamworth 330 kV substation augmentation for New England REZ. Calala A1 and A2 share grid connection infrastructure at Tamworth 330 kV node.
bess_projects.document_title: Calala BESS A1 — State Significant Development Assessment (NSW IPC SSD)

bess_projects.name: Clements Gap - BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Clements Gap wind farm 132 kV substation (co-located)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal. BESS shares the wind farm's 132 kV connection. New BESS feeder bay only. Small 60 MW scale means no significant augmentation required beyond the existing wind farm connection.
bess_projects.document_title: Clements Gap Battery Energy Storage System — EIS (SA)

bess_projects.name: Limondale BESS
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Darlington Point 330 kV substation (co-located with solar farm)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Minimal. Small 50 MW BESS shares solar farm 330 kV connection. New BESS feeder bay only. Very low augmentation cost for this capacity.
bess_projects.document_title: Limondale Battery Energy Storage System — SSD EIS (NSW)

bess_projects.name: Wallgrove Grid Battery project
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Wallgrove 330 kV substation (TransGrid), Eastern Creek, Western Sydney NSW (on-site)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: No augmentation required — TransGrid's own BESS at its own 330 kV substation. Battery provides Virtual Machine Mode (grid-forming) synthetic inertia at a critical Western Sydney transmission node.
bess_projects.document_title: Wallgrove Grid Battery Project — Planning Proposal (NSW IPC SSD-2020-0189)

bess_projects.name: Pottinger Energy Park (BESS)
bess_projects.connection_substation_name: Pottinger 330 kV BESS substation (dedicated, within project boundary)
bess_projects.connection_augmentation: Co-located with wind farm. Dedicated 330 kV BESS substation connects to 330 kV switchyard shared with wind component.
bess_projects.document_title: Pottinger Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (SSD-59235464)

solar_projects.name: New England Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid 330kV transmission line traverses the site; new 33/330kV onsite substation connects directly

solar_projects.name: Western Downs Green Power Hub
solar_projects.document_title: Western Downs Green Power Hub EIS
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 132 kV overhead line to Powerlink Western Downs 275/132 kV substation. Minimal augmentation — existing capacity available.

solar_projects.name: Darlington Point Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: Site directly adjoins TransGrid Darlington Point 330kV substation

solar_projects.name: Limondale Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 220kV underground power line (~500m) to adjacent TransGrid Balranald substation

solar_projects.name: Sunraysia Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 22 kV underground cables to on-site 132/22 kV substation, then 132 kV overhead line to TransGrid Buronga substation.

solar_projects.name: Kiamal Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 220 kV overhead line to AusNet Red Cliffs 220/66 kV substation. Minor augmentation of Red Cliffs substation required.

solar_projects.name: Stubbo Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid 330kV transmission line transects the site; new onsite substation

solar_projects.name: Culcairn Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: TransGrid 330kV transmission line runs through the project site; new onsite substation

solar_projects.name: Coleambally Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 132kV underground transmission cables (~120m) to existing TransGrid Coleambally substation

solar_projects.name: Bungala Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 13km of new 132kV overhead line between Davenport substation and new Emeroo substation; new 275kV Bungala substation constructed onsite

solar_projects.name: Finley Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 33kV underground cables to adjacent TransGrid Finley 132kV substation

solar_projects.name: Ross River Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 1.2km of 132kV underground transmission cable; new bay at Ross Substation

solar_projects.name: Nyngan Solar Plant
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 132 kV overhead line to TransGrid Nyngan substation. Minor augmentation at Nyngan substation.

solar_projects.name: Broken Hill Solar Plant
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: Dual-circuit 22kV overhead line (~2.7km) across Willyama Common to TransGrid 220/22kV Broken Hill substation

solar_projects.name: Moree Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 66 kV overhead line to Essential Energy Moree substation.

solar_projects.name: Darling Downs Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 480m of new transmission line connecting to existing Braemar-Darling Downs 275kV line

solar_projects.name: Wellington Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 2.4km 330kV overhead transmission line to TransGrid Wellington 330/132kV substation

solar_projects.name: Goulburn River Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 500kV transmission line cut-in with new 500kV switching station in southeastern corner of project area

solar_projects.name: Emerald Solar Park
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 66 kV overhead line to Ergon Energy Emerald substation.

solar_projects.name: Clermont Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 132 kV overhead line to Powerlink Lilyvale substation.

solar_projects.name: Childers Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 132 kV overhead line to Ergon Childers substation.

solar_projects.name: Haughton Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: New 33/275kV substation adjacent to existing 275kV Powerlink transmission line

solar_projects.name: Hillston Sun Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: New overhead 132kV generation tie line to adjacent Essential Energy 132/33kV Hillston substation

solar_projects.name: Broadsound Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 132 kV overhead line to Powerlink Broadsound 275/132 kV substation.

solar_projects.name: Gunnedah Solar Farm
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: Tee-in connection from new onsite 132kV substation to existing TransGrid 132kV transmission line

solar_projects.name: Maryvale Solar + BESS
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: Connection via existing Essential Energy 132kV powerline to Wellington substation ~12km south

solar_projects.name: Yanco Solar Farm
solar_projects.developer: Origin Energy (acquired from ib vogt GmbH)
solar_projects.connection_substation_name: TransGrid Yanco 115/33 kV Substation (115 Houghton Road, Yanco)
solar_projects.connection_augmentation: 33 kV overhead or underground transmission line. No large high-voltage transformer required as connects at 33 kV distribution level.
solar_projects.document_title: Yanco Solar Farm Environmental Impact Statement (SSD-9515)

pumped_hydro_projects.name: Snowy 2.0
pumped_hydro_projects.connection_substation_name: Maragle 330 kV Switching Station (new, connects into TransGrid Line 64)
pumped_hydro_projects.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV Maragle Switching Station adjacent to existing Line 64. Two new 330 kV double-circuit overhead transmission lines (~10 km) from Lobs Hole cable yard. HumeLink (365 km, 500 kV double-circuit) from Wagga Wagga to Bannaby required for full NEM integration.
pumped_hydro_projects.document_title: Snowy 2.0 Main Works — Environmental Impact Statement

pumped_hydro_projects.name: Borumba Pumped Hydro Energy Storage
pumped_hydro_projects.connection_substation_name: Woolooga Substation (north, ~90 km) and Halys Substation (south-west, ~106 km)
pumped_hydro_projects.connection_augmentation: Two new 500 kV transmission lines: Borumba to Woolooga (~90 km) and Borumba to Halys (~106 km). Halys line co-locates with existing Powerlink lines near Tarong Power Station for 26 km.
pumped_hydro_projects.document_title: Borumba Pumped Hydro Energy Storage Project — Environmental Impact Statement
